body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: 02 Vcon: JSON Container for Conversation Data
03 Using Deterministic Networks for Remote Process Control & Automation
05 RASP RG: Research and Analysis of Standard-Setting Processes Research Group
06 Using DNS resolvers as certificate validators
8  Extending QUIC for large latency networks such as in space
